transforms.name: vite:vue
vite:css
transforms.result: body{background:#f2f2f2;font-family:sans-serif;margin:0}h1{margin-top:50px}h1,p{text-align:center}p{margin-bottom:60px}h4{font-weight:400;line-height:80px;text-align:center}.masonry{-moz-column-count:3;column-count:3;-moz-column-gap:1em;column-gap:1em;-moz-column-gap:1.5em;column-gap:1.5em;font-size:.85em;margin:1.5em;padding:0}.item{background:#fff;box-shadow:2px 2px 4px 0 #ccc;box-sizing:border-box;-moz-box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-box-sizing:border-box;display:inline-block;margin:0 0 1.5em;-webkit-transition:all 1s ease;width:100%}.item img{max-width:100%}@media only screen and (max-width:320px){.masonry{-moz-column-count:1;column-count:1}}@media only screen and (min-width:321px) and (max-width:768px){.masonry{-moz-column-count:2;column-count:2}}@media only screen and (min-width:769px) and (max-width:1200px){.masonry{-moz-column-count:3;column-count:3}}@media only screen and (min-width:1201px){.masonry{-moz-column-count:3;column-count:3}}
